nasb.text: The Lord was angry enough with Aaron to destroy him; so I also prayed for Aaron at the same time.

esv.text: And the Lord was so angry with Aaron that he was ready to destroy him. And I prayed for Aaron also at the same time.

cnv.text: 耶和華也向亞倫發怒，要消滅他；那時候我也為亞倫祈禱。

ccb.text: 耶和华对亚伦非常愤怒，以致要杀掉他，于是我也为他祈求。
